SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
EvaluationResult
Structured evaluation result for a single candidate.
GaCli
Generic application CLI for runtime management and local runs.
GenerationObserver<C>
Observer callback for per-generation updates.
GenerationStats<C>
Snapshot-style statistics for a single generation of a run.
GeneticAlgorithm<C>
Minimal generic genetic algorithm implementation.
GeneticAlgorithmConfig
Static configuration for a GA run.
InstalledProblems
Application composition root for installed problem adapters.
Move
Primitive puzzle moves of the blank tile.
PuzzleBoard
Immutable sliding-puzzle board.
PuzzleBoard.ExecutionResult
Result of executing a move sequence on a board.
PuzzleCandidate
Move-sequence candidate for the sliding-puzzle domain.
PuzzleDomain
Sliding-puzzle domain plugged into the generic GA core.
PuzzleRunRequest
Request payload for starting one puzzle run through the local runtime/API.
PuzzleRuntimeAdapter
Boundary adapter that plugs the sliding puzzle into the generic runtime.
RegisteredProblem<C,R>
Installable problem adapter for the generic runtime and CLI.
RegistryHttpServer
Central control-plane server that tracks workers and routes run requests.
RunMetadata
Static metadata known at run creation time.
RunRegistry<C>
In-memory registry for active and finished runs.
RunRegistry.RunLauncher<C>
Callback used by the registry-managed executor to run one search.
RunResult<C>
Final result of a completed or stopped run.
RunSnapshot<C>
Public snapshot of a run at a given point in time.
RunStatus
Lifecycle states of a search run.
SearchDomain<C>
Domain contract for the generic search engine.
SearchProblem<C,R>
Domain-facing contract used by the generic runtime layer.
SearchRun<C>
Mutable runtime state of one concrete search run.
SearchRuntimeService<C,R>
Generic runtime service that executes typed run requests.
StartRequestParser<R>
Parses transport-level parameters into a typed run request.
TspCandidate
One round-trip candidate represented as a permutation of city indices.
TspDomain
Travelling-salesman domain on a randomly generated 2D map.
TspDomain.City
One fixed city on the TSP map.
TspRunRequest
Request payload for one travelling-salesman run.
TspRuntimeAdapter
Boundary adapter that plugs the travelling-salesman problem into the runtime.
WorkerHttpServer<C,R>
Generic HTTP worker that exposes runs for one problem adapter.
